name: Empire of Japan (Rising Sun Flag, 1870–1945)
description: A white field bearing a red sun-disc near the centre (offset slightly toward the hoist), with sixteen red rays extending outward to the edges of the flag.
history: The Rising Sun Flag (旭日旗 Kyokujitsu-ki) was adopted as the war ensign of the Imperial Japanese Army in 1870 and the Imperial Japanese Navy in 1889. It remained in use until Japan's defeat in 1945. A modified 8-rayed version remains in use by the Japan Maritime Self-Defense Force, while the 16-rayed version is used by the Japan Ground Self-Defense Force.
